title: Toasted Bread with Buttery Crust
description: A simple and delicious recipe for toasted bread with a crispy, buttery crust.
instructions: Place the slices of bread on a baking sheet.
Spread 1 Tbsp of buttery spread on each slice of bread.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt on top of the buttery spread.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until the bread is toasted and the buttery spread is melted.
Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
